description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular, stone-textured body with two large, circular black speaker cones on the front. A sturdy, rectangular handle rises from the top, making it portable and easy to carry. On the top left corner, three red rectangular buttons are visible, likely serving as control buttons for power, volume, or playback. The back of the unit is plain, with the same stone-like texture and no visible ports or grilles. The sides are flat and show the thickness of the device, with the red buttons extending slightly above the surface. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and simple functionality, suitable for outdoor or urban environments.
description: A stone-textured, rectangular stereo sound system with two large black speaker cones, a top handle, and three red control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large black speaker cones, the handle, and three red buttons on the top left.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the device and the protruding red buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain stone-textured surface with no visible features except the handle and buttons.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the handle and the side profile of the speaker cones.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Three rectangular red buttons located on the top left corner, arranged in a row with no visible labels.
